scripts.deploy:voice-relay: npm run sync:voice-relay-template && npx wrangler deploy --config skills/pipa-huddle-beta/cloudflare/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.dry-run:voice-relay: npm run sync:voice-relay-template && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --config skills/pipa-huddle-beta/cloudflare/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.test: npm run check:voice-relay-template && npm run test:relay
